name: Beneficiary 1 identifier type indicator
description: Beneficiary 1 identifier type indicator is reported as a boolean True/False value, where True indicates that Beneficiary 1 is reported as an LEI.
optionalityRules: Conditionally required where Beneficiary 1 is reported (for Action types: NEWT, MODI, CORR, REVI)
Not reported for Action types: TERM, EROR, PRTO
valueRules: True indicates that Beneficiary 1 is reported as an LEI.

citations.document_name: ASIC Derivative Transaction Rules (Reporting) 2024—Schedule 1 technical guidance
